name: CASPER MCALISTER | SOULMATES
description:
"I think she's my soulmate."

"But you have a girlfriend."

"That's the problem."

Have you ever heard the theory about finding your soulmate when you think you already have one? You have what you want, and then someone comes along with exactly what you need.

I think…I think that’s what Casper thought when he met Riley. So...who are you to him exactly?

A/N. I'm not letting y'all rest—I don't care. Also? Please let me use the valentine tag, I think the badge will be cute!! Btw, his reference was from Pinterest: Bas
creator: Eavanthe
